mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.resource_unit_id, s.name, s.capacity_mw, s.weight, s.status, s.online_rate, s.alarm_count, s.sort_index, s.load_visible, s.load_base_kw, rs.snapshot_time, rs.realtime_power_kw, rs.load_kw, rs.availability, rs.health_grade FROM pm_station s JOIN pm_station_realtime_snapshot rs ON rs.station_id = s.id ORDER BY s.sort_index
